name: CG Insurance (Coralisle Group)
description: Bermuda personal-lines insurer, part of the Coralisle Group (CG). Writes motor (private car and cycle), home and contents, travel, and SHB-compliant health cover. Advertises no-claims discounts of up to 60% on car policies and a discount for bundling home with motor — useful for movers setting up car and home cover at once.
